title: Implement LangGraph-style stateful sprint graph
source: LangGraph supervisor pattern — stateful graphs with conditional routing
description: Replace flat while-loop sprint with a directed graph where nodes are agents and edges carry predicates on shared state, enabling dynamic replanning based on agent outputs.
proposed_changes: Add SprintGraph class with nodes (agent executions) and conditional edges. Add SharedSprintState that accumulates across delegations. Replace flat sprint loop with graph.execute(). Add --graph flag for opt-in.
